name: Cheddar Box Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Toast the pecans for 3-5 minutes.
3. Cream together the butter, dark brown sugar, granulated sugar, and vanilla until well combined.
4. Add the eggs, flour, salt, and baking soda to the mixture. Mix until a dough forms.
5. Stir in the chopped toasted pecans and semi-sweet chocolate chips.
6. Use a 1/4 cup measure to scoop the batter onto an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing each cookie about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 18-20 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
9. Makes approximately 29 cookies.
